abstract.text: Objective-C-only analytical placements that are automatically tracked by Superwall.

inlineContent.text: These placements are tracked internally by the SDK and sent to the delegate method

abstract.text: Called whenever an internal event is tracked.
When the attributes that affect the configuration of Superwall are set or change.
When the enrichment request fails.
When the response to a paywall survey as been recorded.
When a paywall is closed.

When a paywall is opened.
